# decimal128 canonical text -> BID -> DPD encoding vectors (100 values)
# Generated from the decimal128-c engine via the decimal128-python wrapper.
# Every row is round-trip verified: text <-> BID <-> DPD all agree.
#
# Format: comma-separated. '#' begins a comment to end of line.
#         Blank lines and surrounding whitespace are ignored.
# Columns: canonical_text , BID_hex , DPD_hex
#   hex = 0x + 32 UPPERCASE hex digits, most-significant word first.
#
Infinity                                   , 0x78000000000000000000000000000000 , 0x78000000000000000000000000000000   # positive infinity
-Infinity                                  , 0xF8000000000000000000000000000000 , 0xF8000000000000000000000000000000   # negative infinity
NaN                                        , 0x7C000000000000000000000000000000 , 0x7C000000000000000000000000000000   # quiet NaN, no payload
-NaN                                       , 0xFC000000000000000000000000000000 , 0xFC000000000000000000000000000000   # quiet NaN, negative sign
NaN1                                       , 0x7C000000000000000000000000000001 , 0x7C000000000000000000000000000001   # quiet NaN, payload 1
-NaN1                                      , 0xFC000000000000000000000000000001 , 0xFC000000000000000000000000000001   # quiet NaN, negative, payload 1
NaN12345                                   , 0x7C000000000000000000000000003039 , 0x7C0000000000000000000000000049C5   # quiet NaN, payload 12345
-NaN12345                                  , 0xFC000000000000000000000000003039 , 0xFC0000000000000000000000000049C5   # quiet NaN, negative, payload 12345
NaN1234567890123456                        , 0x7C00000000000000000462D53C8ABAC0 , 0x7C00000000000000000534B9C1E28E56   # quiet NaN, large payload
-NaN1234567890123456                       , 0xFC00000000000000000462D53C8ABAC0 , 0xFC00000000000000000534B9C1E28E56   # quiet NaN, negative, large payload

-sNaN                                      , 0xFE000000000000000000000000000000 , 0xFE000000000000000000000000000000   # signaling NaN, negative sign
sNaN1                                      , 0x7E000000000000000000000000000001 , 0x7E000000000000000000000000000001   # signaling NaN, payload 1
-sNaN1                                     , 0xFE000000000000000000000000000001 , 0xFE000000000000000000000000000001   # signaling NaN, negative, payload 1
